name: Baseline Human
summary: Adaptable survivors from too many failed worlds. Jack-of-all-trades, stubborn by tradition.

name: Vaylen
summary: Low-gravity tunnel dwellers with uncanny balance, lean frames, and a habit of never giving straight answers.

name: Synthel
summary: Lab-grown near-humans with embedded bio-circuit lattices and uneasy legal status.

name: Karrox
summary: Massive heat-adapted frontier folk with plated hides, industrial lungs, and very little patience.

name: Morrowkin
summary: Nocturnal void-nomads who shape memory through ritual light and can read fear in microexpressions.
